question: Can prior completed UTC-day realized funding sign condition a fixed 20/30/60/90-day BTCUSDT perpetual Donchian long-short state machine so that realistic-cost risk-adjusted performance and funding PnL improve sufficiently for sequential product consideration?
intended_claim: product consideration only after every sequential gate

data_boundary.known_exposure: BTC market history through 2026H1 has been viewed by other questions; carry-conditioned strategy outcomes have not been run. Isolation is method-level, not virgin-market-data-level.

fixed_strategy.direction_source: equal mean of stateful LONG_SHORT components
fixed_strategy.exit: component midpoint trailing exit that never moves against the position
fixed_strategy.carry_signal: sign of the prior completed UTC day's realized funding cashflow per unit; positive means long pays and short receives; zero is neutral

development_gate: base and stress total return positive
base Sharpe and Calmar both exceed pure long-short and pure long-only Donchian benchmarks
base funding PnL improves the pure long-short benchmark
three-candidate Deflated Sharpe probability at least 0.80
selection_rule: select at most one passer by highest worst annual base return, then stress Sharpe, then base Sharpe, then candidate_id
evaluation_gate: base and stress total return positive
base Sharpe and Calmar both exceed pure long-short and pure long-only Donchian benchmarks
base funding PnL improves the pure long-short benchmark
confirmation_gate: base and stress total return non-negative
base funding PnL no worse than pure long-short benchmark
evaluation plus confirmation compound base and stress returns positive
allowed_fixes_after_checkpoint: Only implementation, serialization, data-integrity or documentation corrections that preserve the economic rule, candidates, periods, costs, gates and selection order. Every fix must be recorded and the method hash updated before opening a new phase.
opening_rule: Run development only. Evaluation requires selection.json evaluation_authorized=true. Confirmation requires evaluation_gate.json confirmation_authorized=true.
